_template_metadata._comment: Phase 238 Step I-FINAL — DID document template for vapi-curator (third Operator Initiative agent). Mirrors vapi-anchor-sentry + vapi-guardian template shape per Pass 2C Section 6.1 specification; populated during Phase 238 Step I-FINAL agent registration when the bridge wallet authorizes the on-chain mint+register sequence. Placeholders use the form <name>; the IPFS pinning step substitutes real values at registration time.
